placeholders.background: Capture the context, goal, and why this matters now
placeholders.acceptance: Describe the outcome that should be true when this is done
placeholders.risks: Note the current risks, dependencies, or who can help unblock it
placeholders.nextStep: Write the next action that should move this work forward

fields.title: Title
fields.descriptionPlaceholder: Add context, acceptance criteria, or follow-up notes

assignee.teamHint: Choose from the full team member list in this workspace.
assignee.personalHint: You are always the assignee in a personal workspace.
assignee.personalQueueHint: This issue will automatically land in your personal queue.
assignee.personalPendingHint: Your member identity is still syncing. You will be able to create the issue shortly.

toasts.authRequired: Authentication could not be verified. Please sign in again.
toasts.memberSyncPending: We are still syncing your member identity. Please wait a moment and try again.
toasts.createFailed: Failed to create the issue. Please try again.
toasts.boardOrderMissingWorkspace: The current workspace is invalid, so the board order cannot be saved.
toasts.boardOrderUnchanged: The board order has not changed.
toasts.boardOrderSaveFailed: Failed to save the board order. Please try again.
toasts.updateFailed: Failed to update the issue state. Please try again.

summary.mixed: Currently showing {total} issues, including {active} active ones.
summary.mySuffix: Only issues you own, participate in, or created are included.
summary.listViewHint: List view hides done and canceled issues by default. Switch to board view to see every state.

filters.searchPlaceholder: Search by title, project, assignee, or issue key...

page.onlyCreatorCanCancel: Only the creator can cancel this issue.
page.cancelled: Issue canceled. It is now hidden in list view by default.
page.cancelFailed: Failed to cancel the issue. Please try again.

cancelDialog.title: Cancel this issue?
cancelDialog.description: The issue will be moved to Canceled and hidden in list view by default. The record stays in place and related assignees will still see it.

discussion.title: Discussion
discussion.empty: No comments yet. Be the first to add context here.
discussion.placeholder: Add a comment... Use @ to mention teammates

history.empty: No activity has been recorded yet.

records.empty: No outputs have been recorded yet.

nodeStatus.title: Node status
nodeStatus.description: Click the status dots to update progress, then move to the next step when ready.
nodeStatus.cannotEdit: Only the current owner can update the node status or move the workflow forward.
nodeStatus.completeHint: Mark this node as Done before moving to the next step.
nodeStatus.finishHint: Mark this node as Done before finishing the workflow.
nodeStatus.ready: This node is ready to move forward.
nodeStatus.finalReady: This node is ready to finish the workflow issue: {title}.

workflowCompletionDialog.title: Confirm workflow completion
workflowCompletionDialog.description: This is the final node. Once you submit, this workflow issue will be marked as done.
workflowCompletionDialog.confirmLabel: I have confirmed with the team that this issue is ready to be completed
workflowCompletionDialog.confirmDescription: Only finish the workflow after any needed review, handoff, or team confirmation is complete.
workflowCompletionDialog.inputLabel: Type the current issue title to confirm
workflowCompletionDialog.inputError: The issue title does not match.

recordModal.title: Add output
recordModal.placeholder: What was completed in this step?

workflowDetail.notFound: This workflow issue does not exist or has been deleted.

detailPage.missingWorkspaceDescription: Choose a workspace before opening this issue.
detailPage.loadingDescription: Syncing the issue details and collaboration context.
detailPage.notFoundDescription: This issue may have been deleted, or your current account no longer has access.

toasts.invalidWorkspace: The current workspace is invalid, so the issue could not be saved.
toasts.updateFailed: Failed to update the issue. Please try again.
toasts.missingDoneState: No usable done state is available in the current workspace.

states.notFound: This issue does not exist or has been deleted.

description.title: Issue description
description.referencedDocs: {count, plural, one {# referenced document.} other {# referenced documents.}}
description.placeholder:
Use Markdown to explain the background, acceptance criteria, risks, and next steps.
For example:
## Background
- Why this matters
- [ ] Pending questions
description.empty: No description yet. Add background, acceptance criteria, risks, and related docs.

aiHandoff.title: AI coding handoff
aiHandoff.fallback: Saved back to this issue and ready to hand off to Claude Code or Codex.
aiHandoff.copySuccess: The coding handoff prompt has been copied.

docCards.title: Key docs
docCards.subtitle: Keep the review packet, handoff packet, and decision note anchored to the issue instead of scattering them across chat.
docCards.createFailed: Failed to create the issue doc.
docCards.createForbidden: You do not have permission to create an issue doc here.

docReference.label: Doc
docReference.pickerDescription: Choose a document to insert into the issue description. You can click the document tag inside the description to preview it later.
docReference.empty: No team documents are available to reference yet.
docReference.previewDescription: Preview of the referenced document from the team space.
docReference.previewEmpty: This document does not have any content yet.

toasts.blockFailed: Failed to mark the workflow as blocked.

overview.title: Task overview
overview.empty: No introduction has been added yet. Add background, acceptance criteria, handoff notes, and related docs.

collaboration.title: Collaboration status
collaboration.activeDescription: The current owner can request a review, hand off the step, or mark it blocked when outside help is needed.
collaboration.targetPlaceholder: Choose who should review or take over
collaboration.notePlaceholder: Add review, handoff, or blocker notes. When marking blocked, explain the cause, who can help, and when progress may resume.
collaboration.targetOptionalHint: Review and handoff need a target member. Blocking can still be submitted directly.
collaboration.noEligibleTarget: There is no other eligible teammate to receive a review or handoff yet.
collaboration.onlyCurrentOwner: Only the current owner can request a review, start a handoff, or mark this workflow blocked.

review.waitingDescription: Once the review is approved, the workflow will continue. If changes are needed, you can send it back directly.
review.placeholder: Write the review decision or requested changes
review.readonlyHint: This step is waiting for {name}. You can still add context in the discussion tab.

handoff.waitingDescription: After takeover, ownership of the current step will move to the new assignee.
handoff.placeholder: Add a handoff note, such as what should happen next
handoff.readonlyHint: This step is waiting for {name} to take over. You can still add handoff context in the discussion tab.

blocked.title: This step is blocked
blocked.description: Owner: {name}. The blocker note should explain the cause, who can help, and the expected recovery time.
blocked.placeholder: Explain why the blocker is resolved, or add the next step after recovery
blocked.readonlyHint: Only the current owner can unblock this workflow. Other teammates can still add context in the discussion tab.

done.description: This workflow is complete. You can revisit the outputs and collaboration history here later.

workflowFlow.focusingNode: is focusing on the current node
